report.summary: Cycle 11 EOD: No new pages built since v10, 388 uncommitted files (+11), 145 TS errors (-1), deploy critical at 3+ days stale — 4 PUBLISH_QUEUE items pending (2 blocked, 2 ready)

sections.title: QA Tester
items: 0 new pages built since v10. 9 pages built today total (since v1): depin, gas-fees, bear-market, smart-money, starknet, etf-in-kind, telegram-mini-apps, onchain-forex, tariffs-trade-war
602 published slugs in PUBLISHED_PAGES (+4 from v10), 1,229 page.tsx files on disk (+4 from v10 baseline of ~1,225)
~105 legacy slugs still missing page.tsx (wallets/*, investing/best/*, taxes/*, some learn/* and blog/*) — unchanged
145 TypeScript errors (-1 from v10): 94 in lido-v3-stvaults-guide, 40 in structured-data.examples.ts, 11 across 3 learn pages — all JSX syntax, non-blocking for production build
No regressions detected. All previously built pages intact on disk. Network egress blocked — unable to verify live HTTP 200

sections.title: Data Engineer
items: 6/6 core API routes present and healthy: fear-greed (10min TTL), trending (5min TTL), market-metrics (60s TTL), market-dominance (5min TTL), prices (60s TTL), defi-yields (60s s-maxage)
All routes implement triple-layer caching: in-memory cache + CDN s-maxage + stale-while-revalidate headers
All routes have fallback data patterns for upstream failures (CoinGecko, DefiLlama, Alternative.me)
defi-yields route has lighter fallback pattern (1 reference vs 6-10 in other routes) — minor resilience gap noted, unchanged from v10
CoinGecko free tier still in use (no API key detected in routes). Rate limiting risk unchanged at scale
No changes to API route files since last cycle. Data layer stable

sections.title: DevOps
items: HEAD at commit 21aaf5b (Mar 25 09:26 batch deploy) — unchanged for 3+ days. 388 uncommitted files (+11 from v10's 377)
CRITICAL: Deploy blocker now in 21st+ consecutive cycle. All content built since Mar 25 invisible to production
31 files changed / 982 insertions / 595 deletions pending in working tree vs HEAD
TypeScript compilation: 145 non-blocking errors (JSX syntax in example/guide files). Production build would likely succeed via Next.js which skips type errors by default
Unable to verify live Vercel deployment status due to network egress restrictions

sections.title: Project Manager
items: SHIPPED THIS CYCLE: No new pages built since v10. Quiet cycle — likely between active sessions
CUMULATIVE TODAY (Mar 28): 11 EOD reviews, 9 new learn pages built, 6+ publish cycles, 8+ build cycles, 9+ design/community cycles
PUBLISH_QUEUE STATUS: 4 items — 2 blocked (wallet-security slug mismatch, restaking no page.tsx), 2 ready to promote (telegram-mini-apps, onchain-forex)

CARRY-OVER BLOCKERS: (1) P0 — 388 uncommitted files need git commit + push. (2) P1 — 2 PUBLISH_QUEUE items blocked on slug/page issues. (3) P2 — 105 published slugs missing page.tsx. (4) P2 — CoinGecko free tier rate limit risk. (5) P3 — Health endpoint uses mock checks
NEEDS JEFE: Git commit + push remains the single highest-leverage action. 3+ days of accumulated work (20+ pages, OG images, UX fixes) blocked from production and Google indexing
